name: RIO Governance Constitution
purpose: Define the immutable governance rules that all agents, systems, and actions must follow within the RIO execution environment.

invariants.identity: Every action must have a known origin (agent_id) and a known target (human authority).
invariants.consent: No action with external effect may execute without explicit human authorization.
invariants.persistence: Every authorized action must produce a receipt, and every receipt must be written to the ledger.
invariants.confidence: Every AI recommendation must carry a confidence score. Actions below threshold require human escalation.

governance_rules: AI may think and plan freely.
All receipts must be stored in ledger.
If authorization is missing, execution is denied.
If authorization is expired, execution is denied.
If scope is ambiguous, execution is denied.
